calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Moll for Mohammad Alam (Petitioner).

The Court stated that the Examiner questioned the timeliness of the disclaimer. Mr. Moll stated that he spoke with the Parents of the Decedent, that they were withdrawing the disclaimer, that they were willing to gift the property to their Children, and that the withdrawal of the disclaimer and the amended petition was filed on May 13, 2010. The Court stated that the disclaimer was irrevocable. Mr. Moll stated that July of 2009 was when the Parents first beacame aware of their interest in the Son's property. The matter was taken under submission to determine the proper order to be signed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Continued To May-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
